parsed.rationale: The image includes a scale bar representing 20 nm. By visually comparing the diameter of the gray lipid envelope to this scale bar, the diameter is approximately four times the length of the bar. Therefore, the diameter is roughly 80 nm, which makes the radius approximately 40 nm.
